header-exec-summary.content:
## OPENCODE MONITORING
Monitors LLM usage, session activity, and tool behavior from [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode) sessions using its built-in OpenTelemetry support — no code changes required.

Enable telemetry by setting `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` and `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS` before running `opencode`. Traces export directly to Dynatrace via HTTP/protobuf.

For full setup instructions, see the [GitHub example](https://github.com/dynatrace-oss/dynatrace-ai-agent-instrumentation-examples/tree/main/ai-coding-agents/opencode).

kpi-llm-calls.title: LLM Calls
kpi-llm-calls.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| summarize LLMCalls = count()

kpi-sessions.title: Sessions
kpi-sessions.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode"
| summarize Sessions = countDistinct(`session.id`)

kpi-tool-calls.title: Tool Executions
kpi-tool-calls.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "Tool.execute"
| summarize ToolCalls = count()

kpi-avg-duration.title: Avg LLM Duration (s)
kpi-avg-duration.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| summarize AvgDuration = avg(duration)/1e9

chart-llm-calls-over-time.title: LLM Calls Over Time
chart-llm-calls-over-time.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| makeTimeseries count = count(), interval: 1h

chart-tool-calls-over-time.title: Tool Executions Over Time
chart-tool-calls-over-time.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "Tool.execute"
| makeTimeseries count = count(), interval: 1h

chart-llm-duration-trend.title: Avg LLM Duration Over Time (ns)
chart-llm-duration-trend.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| makeTimeseries avgDurationNs = avg(duration), interval: 1h

pie-model.title: LLM Calls by Model
pie-model.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| summarize count = count(), by: {modelID}
| sort count desc

pie-provider.title: LLM Calls by Provider
pie-provider.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| summarize count = count(), by: {providerID}
| sort count desc

chart-llm-calls-by-model.title: LLM Calls by Model Over Time
chart-llm-calls-by-model.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| makeTimeseries count = count(), by: {modelID}, interval: 1h

table-llm-by-session.title: LLM Activity by Session
table-llm-by-session.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| summarize llmCalls = count(), avgDurationSec = avg(duration)/1e9, by: {`session.id`, modelID}
| sort llmCalls desc

kpi-p95-duration.title: p95 LLM Duration (s)
kpi-p95-duration.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| summarize P95Duration = percentile(duration, 95)/1e9

kpi-llm-errors.title: LLM Errors
kpi-llm-errors.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run" and isError == true
| summarize Errors = count()

chart-agent-mode.title: LLM Calls by Agent Mode
chart-agent-mode.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| summarize count = count(), by: {mode}
| sort count desc

chart-most-used-tools.title: Most Used Tools
chart-most-used-tools.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "Tool.execute"
| summarize count = count(), by: {`tool.name`}
| sort count desc

chart-tool-calls-by-name-over-time.title: Tool Executions by Tool Over Time
chart-tool-calls-by-name-over-time.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "Tool.execute"
| makeTimeseries count = count(), by: {`tool.name`}, interval: 1h

header-user-activity.content:
## USER ACTIVITY

OpenCode tracks activity per `opencode.run_id` — a UUID generated per process invocation, which serves as a unique user/workspace identifier.

chart-llm-calls-by-run.title: LLM Calls by Run ID
chart-llm-calls-by-run.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode" and span.name == "LLM.run"
| summarize count = count(), by: {`opencode.run_id`}
| sort count desc

chart-sessions-by-run.title: Sessions by Run ID
chart-sessions-by-run.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(`session.id`), by: {`opencode.run_id`}
| sort sessions desc

table-live-spans.title: Live Span Feed
table-live-spans.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-24h
| filter service.name == "opencode"
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 50
| fields timestamp, span.name, `session.id`, providerID, modelID, `tool.name`, duration

chart-span-volume.title: Span Volume by Type
chart-span-volume.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "opencode"
| makeTimeseries count = count(), by: {span.name}, interval: 1h
